Event: The Lost Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/06/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A163


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mask of Fear

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Frightening Mask
The unit's attacks against stunned or scared enemies deal an extra 75000 pure damage.

When attacking, the unit has a 25% chance to either stun the target for 2,5 sec or scare it for 2,5 sec.

Once in a while when taking damage, whenever the unit's health drops below 30%, the unit either stuns or scares all enemies in a small radius around the unit for 4 sec, and goes into a frenzy. The artifact owner increases in size and all their stats increase by 25% for 4 sec. During this time, the unit's attacks also deal damage in a small area around the main target and restore the artifact owner's health equal to 80% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
